docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECKAR, PETR AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, EDWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-21-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PETR SECKAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDWARD GEE IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,800.00 FILED BY SECKAR, PETR AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, EDWARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $50.00(WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECKAR, PETR AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, EDWARD
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED DEC-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, EDWARD
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GEE, EDWARD
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-21-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAR-10-2026 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PETR SECKAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EDWARD GEE IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SECKAR, PETR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEE, EDWARD $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, EDWARD
